title: ICIIP -2017
content: 2017 Fourth International Conference on Image Information Processing (ICIIP -2017) December 21 - 23 , 2017 Jaypee University of Information Technology Waknaghat, District Solan, Near Shimla, Himachal Pradesh, INDIA ICIIP 2017 Conference Programme (Click Here) Technical Program Schedule (Click Here) Accepted and Presented papers available @IEEE Xplore Digital Library Accepted and presented papers will be eligible for submission to the IEEE Xplore Digital Library. IEEE Conference Record number: #41247 IEEE Catalogue number: CFP1769N-PRT ; ISBN: 978-1-5090-6733-6 ( Print Version) IEEE Catalogue number: CFP1769N-DVD ; ISBN: 978-1-5090-6732-9 (DVD Version) IEEE Catalogue number: CFP1769N-ART ; ISBN: 978-1-5090-6734-3 (XPLORE COMPLIANT) Statistics of ICIIP 2017 Received total submissions: 515 Accepted submissions: 155 Acceptance rate: 30% Indexed at IEEEXplore: 129 No. of TPC members: 305 (from 49 different countries) Google scholar metrics shows h5-index =15 and h5-median = 19 for International Conference on Image Information Processing (ICIIP) Authors of selected and presented papers at ICIIP 2017 will be invited to resubmit their extended manuscripts (substantially revised, expanded and rewritten) for possible publication in 1. Special Issue on: "Multimedia Information Security Solutions on Social Networks" ( SCOPUS INDEXED ) . Further such authors will meet the copyright permission requirements of the journal concerned. Authors will be charged no extra fee for the same. International Journal of Information and Computer Security Special Issue on: "Multimedia Information Security Solutions on Social Networks" Guest Editors : Dr. Amit Kumar Singh, Jaypee University of Information Technology, India Prof. Harry (Haoxiang) Wang, GoPerception Laboratory, USA Prof. Mohamed Elhoseny, University of North Texas, USA Dr. S. Ramakrishnan, Dr. Mahalingam College of Engineering and Technology, India 2. Submission of Book Chapter at IGI Global, USA "Handbook of Research on Predictive Intelligence Using Big Data and the Internet of Things" . Authors are required to meet with the stated guideline for submitting the chapter proposal. No fee will be charged for publishing. Editors: Dr. P.K. Gupta, Jaypee University of Information Technology, India Prof. Dr. Tuncer �ren, University of Ottawa, Canada Dr. Mayank Singh, University of Kwazulu Natal, South Africa The ICIIP (International Conference on Image Information Processing) conference has been a biennial Conference at Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Solan, H.P., India since 2011 with sponsorship of IEEE. The conference has become a platform for Computer Science researchers from India and abroad to exchange research results and ideas on the foundations and applications of Image Processing and related areas. The area of Imaging Science and Image Computing has grown enormously in the past decade with wide ranging applications encompassing multiple disciplines of Computer Science & Technology, Information Systems, Information Theory & Sciences, Artificial Intelligence, Cognition, Cybernetics, Medical Sciences, Mathematics, Physics and Psychology. It is primarily concerned with the process of Image generation, Visualization, Structuring of large real life image data and Analysis for classification, prediction based on machine learning, behavioral analysis and virtualization. From the perspective of computer science and information technology, the subareas of Image Processing, Computer Vision, Image security & forensics, Pattern recognition and Computer Graphics form the core areas and the Fourth International Conference on Image Information Processing (ICIIP 2017) is being organized by and being held at JUIT Waknaghat, Solan, H.P., India during December 2017, will cover all of these core areas. Like the previous years, the proceedings of the conference are to be published by IEEE Computer Society Press in IEEE Explore. This time, theme of the conference is ‘ Image Processing for Digital Life ’. However, ICIIP 2017 solicits original papers contributions in all of the related areas. The topics listed under each of these core areas is not meant to be exhaustive. The objective of the conference is to bring together researchers in the academic institutions and R&D Research Labs, working in the related fields and to use this as a forum to exchange views and ideas in these topics of current research. Technical Tracks : Image Processing Computer Graphics Pattern Recognition Computer Vision Image Security & Forensics Important Dates Full paper Submission Deadline : October 30, 2017 Acceptance Notification Deadline: November 15, 2017 Camera-Ready Manuscript Deadline: November 25, 2017 Conference Registration Deadline: November 30, 2017 Conference Dates: December 21 - 23, 2017 Organized by Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, District Solan, Near Shimla, Himachal Pradesh, INDIA www.juit.ac.in
